metrics.name: RequestProcessed
metrics.description: Emitted once per successfully handled tRPC request on the API Lambda.

metrics.name: RequestFailed
metrics.description: Emitted once per tRPC procedure that throws or returns an error on the API Lambda.

metrics.name: ProcessingDuration
metrics.description: Wall-clock time to handle one API Gateway invocation of the API Lambda, from request in to response out.

metrics.name: MessageIngested
metrics.description: Emitted once per inbound message successfully normalized, deduped, and persisted by the ingest processor Lambda, dimensioned by channel (gmail, sms, ...).

metrics.name: MessageFailed
metrics.description: Emitted once per inbound message the poller or processor Lambda could not fetch, normalize, or persist, dimensioned by channel.

metrics.name: ProcessingDuration
metrics.description: Wall-clock time for one poller tick (all accounts) or one processor invocation (one message) on the ingest Lambdas.
